question.label: Impact beyond shipping
question.name: When you look at the last quarter, where did your work change a decision or outcome beyond the analysis itself?
question.description: Surfaces whether she is framing impact in business terms rather than only delivered work.

answer: I tend to wait until analysis is complete before socializing direction.

assessment.note: She names a repeatable pattern of waiting until analysis is finished before engaging others, which weakens both impact growth and clarity of influence expectations.

new_queue.label: Wait until complete
new_queue.name: You said you wait until analysis is complete — what makes you hold back then?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Execution bias
new_queue.name: What do you think pulls you toward execution over influence in the moment?

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, what is the one change you want to make first?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I get work done, yet I am not consistently shaping decisions early.
Some feedback has been about being clearer with non-technical partners.
